notes: Values are extracted from the uploaded Excel file.
The workbook contains two source sections: Reduced Tees and Conc./Excentr. Reducers.
Dash and blank cells were converted to JSON null. Text values such as On request were preserved.
No independent engineering code validation has been performed on the dimensional values.

field_dictionary.size_parts_nps: List of NPS display values parsed from size.
field_dictionary.size_parts_nps_in: List of NPS values as decimal inches for sorting/filtering.
field_dictionary.inside_diameter_std_mm: Inside diameters for standard wall in mm.
field_dictionary.inside_diameter_XS_mm: Inside diameters for extra strong wall in mm.
field_dictionary.wall_thickness_std_mm: Standard wall thickness values in mm.
field_dictionary.wall_thickness_XS_mm: Extra strong wall thickness values in mm.
field_dictionary.dimensions_mm: Fitting dimensional values. Tee uses C/E/F. Reducer uses length_L and eccentric_offset_M.
field_dictionary.weight_kg: Standard and XS fitting weights in kg where provided.
field_dictionary.source_excel_row: Original row number in the uploaded Excel sheet.
